command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rp6zCMfN7Vv5FK.root --database AV298FS8t5SaTurBBRqhgQ --execute 
-- 1. Ampliar el enum channel para incluir 'tpv'
ALTER TABLE reservations 
  MODIFY COLUMN channel ENUM('web','crm','telefono','email','otro','tpv') DEFAULT 'web';

-- 2. Hacer customerEmail nullable (ventas TPV sin email de cliente)
ALTER TABLE reservations 
  MODIFY COLUMN customer_email VARCHAR(255) NULL;
